description: Execute V0.7-M5-A by defining the .agent-state/ separation roadmap, including the target state, intermediate/compatibility state, and rollback paths.
scope: Generate a roadmap document (tasks/v0.7-m5-a-state-separation-roadmap.md) that explicitly answers the M5 directives on state separation target, intermediate states, backward compatibility, and rollback paths.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO physical migration of .agent-state/. NO modifications to existing MCP server or bootstrap scripts. NO workflow state semantics modifications.
stop_conditions: Attempting to perform actual .agent-state/ physical migrations.
Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Executing without an approved M5-A contract.
